requirement_title: Initial Document Setup for Test Acte

TC-S5-015-01.description: Run app startup, verify root_docs documents copied to ACTE-2024-001 folders

TC-S5-015-02.description: Open ACTE-2024-001, verify 7 documents visible in correct folders

TC-S5-015-03.description: Personal Data folder, verify contains 3 documents (Geburtsurkunde, Personalausweis, Aufenthalstitel)

TC-S5-015-06.description: Applications & Forms folder, verify contains Anmeldeformular.pdf

TC-S5-015-07.description: Additional Evidence folder, verify contains Notenspiegel.pdf

TC-S5-015-08.description: Click Geburtsurkunde.jpg, verify image displays with German birth certificate

TC-S5-015-09.description: Click Email.eml, verify email displays with Arabic text

TC-S5-015-10.description: Click Anmeldeformular.pdf, verify PDF loads correctly

TC-S5-015-11.description: Old irrelevant test documents removed, verify not visible in any case

TC-S5-015-12.description: Document registry updated, verify manifest includes all 7 new documents

TC-S5-015-13.description: Restart app, verify documents persist and remain visible

TC-S5-015-14.description: Run validation on ACTE-2024-001, verify some required documents present
